title: Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Noida operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
